title: NotificationCampaignStats
description: Neynar Farcaster API schema for NotificationCampaignStats

error_breakdown.description: Detailed breakdown of errors encountered during notification delivery.

delivery_errors.description: A record mapping delivery error types to their occurrence counts.

http_errors.description: A record mapping HTTP status codes to their occurrence counts.

intended_recipient_app_fids.description: An array of Farcaster FIDs of intended recipient applications.

intended_recipient_notification_token_co.description: The total number of notification tokens for intended recipients.

successful_sends.description: The number of notifications successfully sent.

successful_sends_by_app_fid.description: A record mapping app FIDs (as strings) to the number of successful sends for that app.

total_opens.description: The total number of times notifications from this campaign have been opened.

total_opens_by_app_fid.description: A record mapping app FIDs (as strings) to the number of opens for that app.

unique_opens.description: The number of unique recipients who opened a notification from this campaign.

unique_opens_by_app_fid.description: A record mapping app FIDs (as strings) to the number of unique opens for that app.
